name: Maison Clio Blue SA
summary: Maison Clio Blue SA operates as a silver jewelry company in France. It offers a line of men's goods, watch collection, and leather goods. The company markets its products through approximately 40 department stores and 200 multi-brand jewelers in Europe, Asia, the United States, Africa, Australia, and New Caledonia. Maison Clio Blue SA was founded in 1981 and is based in Paris, France.
